ksa_text: Document analytical methodologies, data sources, findings, business rules, and transformation logic, including producing documentation that meets evidence standards for regulatory compliance, audit, and executive decision support.

dcwf.top_element_label: Skill in conducting audits or reviews of technical systems.

nice.top_element_label: Knowledge of evidence admissibility laws and regulations

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: P3 include upheld. External evidence from AB-domain frameworks confirms KSA relevance to Data Analyst at IC-to-senior-IC level.

decision_rationale: Pipeline consensus: include. P2 include confirmed by P3 (internal) and P4 (external) adversarial agents. Zero overturns. Composite 0.4352, domain AB, scope strong fit. High confidence.
